initial_entry.name: Brain Dump Mode
initial_entry.author: yesjinu
initial_entry.description: Done is better than perfect. This plugin helps you 'COMPLETE' your first-messy-draft before you make it 'PERFECT'. Once you turn on the Brain Dump Mode, your delete key will be DISABLED and all you can do is JUST BURN YOUR KEYBOARDS🔥
